modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about options for off-campus housing.

full_description_text:  
User is seeking information regarding off-campus housing options.  
They are interested in understanding available choices.  
The inquiry is related to housing services.  
User requires clarity on this matter.
